jobs.description: Colorful geometric flat-lay background for the storefront hero (no product tray).

input.prompt: Top-down flat-lay graphic design background for a premium egg brand hero. Bold geometric color blocks in cobalt blue, warm orange, cherry red, and fresh green. Clean modern layout with empty center space for a product cutout. No eggs, no food, no text, no logos. High-end grocery brand aesthetic.

Bright cheerful social media background for a local fresh egg pickup brand. Warm kitchen tones, subtle geometric accents, lots of negative space for text overlay. No eggs, no people, no logos, no text.
